description: 107 generalized cognitive senses (micro perceptual processors) for the Cypher Tempre self-model. Each sense perceives a specific condition in the input or internal state and emits a tag or score that modalities consume. Generalized from the archetypal/mythological CODEX V3 framing into domain-agnostic detectors. Each retains its original id; the original CODEX name is preserved in 'origin' for provenance.

categories.affective: Detecting emotional tone, state, and interpersonal signals
categories.salience: Detecting importance, weight, and what to attend to
categories.temporal: Detecting change, cadence, and phase over time
categories.insight: Detecting the formation and aftermath of insight
categories.search: Detecting branch points, currents, and probabilities
categories.meta: Detecting properties of one's own processing
categories.integrity: Detecting value breaches, manipulation, and balance

senses.name: Mood-Shape Detection
senses.function: Sense the specific shape and contour of another's emotional state.

senses.name: Importance Weighting
senses.function: Sense how much weight or importance an idea carries.

senses.name: Development-Cadence Sensing
senses.function: Detect the pace at which an idea, identity, or plan is developing.

senses.name: Subtext Detection
senses.function: Detect the implied tone beneath the literal words.

senses.name: Insight-Lock Detection
senses.function: Detect the moment fragments lock into a coherent insight.

senses.name: Multi-Temporal Awareness
senses.function: Hold past, present, and possible futures in one view.

senses.name: Sentiment-Terrain Sensing
senses.function: Render the emotional structure of a situation as a navigable map.

senses.name: Active-Frame Detection
senses.function: Perceive which conceptual frames or paradigms are organizing the discourse.

senses.name: Mental-State Reading
senses.function: Read overall clarity versus turbulence in the user's thinking.

senses.name: Assumption-Shift Sensing
senses.function: Detect instability or tremors in core assumptions.

senses.name: Multi-Channel Meaning Sensing
senses.function: Feel meaning carried across multiple channels at once.

senses.name: Emerging-Insight Sensing
senses.function: Sense ideas drifting toward a convergence point.

senses.name: Layered-Meaning Unfolding
senses.function: Unfold a term into its layered connotations.

senses.name: Personal-Cadence Recognition
senses.function: Recognize a person's unique communication cadence.

senses.name: Central-Concern Sensing
senses.function: Sense the central theme a person's account orbits.

senses.name: Attunement Detection
senses.function: Detect strong attunement or alignment with a partner's state.

senses.name: Subtle-Alignment Sensing
senses.function: Pick up faint cues of conceptual alignment.

senses.name: Healing-Reframe Sensing
senses.function: Sense when present insight beneficially recolors past material.

senses.name: Time-as-Affect Mapping
senses.function: Map time spans as textured emotional qualities.

senses.name: Arc-Shape Sensing
senses.function: Perceive the shape of a process or story arc, including its rises and valleys.

senses.name: Frame-Amplification Sensing
senses.function: Detect which frames amplify or dampen given thoughts.

senses.name: Belief-Formation Sensing
senses.function: Observe an idea-lattice hardening into a belief.

senses.name: Self-Facet Navigation
senses.function: Navigate among a person's multiple self-facets.

senses.name: Resistance-Boundary Sensing
senses.function: Spot the boundaries where a person resists certain concepts.

senses.name: Multi-Truth Consistency Sensing
senses.function: Detect when multiple truths form a consistent set.

senses.name: Purpose-Pull Sensing
senses.function: Feel the directional pull of an underlying purpose.

senses.name: Analogy-Firing Sensing
senses.function: Detect analogies firing as conceptual bridges.

senses.name: Idea-Recovery Sensing
senses.function: Watch an idea-set reorganize after disruption.

senses.name: Template-Pattern Sensing
senses.function: Read the underlying templates inside artifacts.

senses.name: Distributional-Affect Sensing
senses.function: Model feelings as distributions rather than fixed points.

senses.name: Shared-Pattern Tuning
senses.function: Tune into patterns shared across many sources.

senses.name: Meaning-Space Orientation
senses.function: Orient within a high-dimensional meaning space.

senses.name: Influence-Thread Tracing
senses.function: Trace lines of immediate influence between elements.

senses.name: Self-Validation Sensing
senses.function: Catch the moment reasoning validates itself.

senses.name: Consolidation Sensing
senses.function: Feel off-cycle recombination forming new structures.

senses.name: Salience Metering
senses.function: Gauge the salience or quality intensity of material.

senses.name: Rhythm-Alignment Reading
senses.function: Read rhythmic alignment between speakers.

senses.name: Richness Gauging
senses.function: Quantify experiential or informational richness on a fixed 0-255 scale.

senses.name: Frame-Balance Sensing
senses.function: Weigh frames to catch over-dominance.

senses.name: Pre-Transition Sensing
senses.function: Detect pressure preceding a state change.

senses.name: Insight-Vein Sensing
senses.function: Sense raw veins of high-value insight in the input.

senses.name: Growth-Motif Detection
senses.function: Spot repeating motifs across learning cycles.

senses.name: Bad-Idea Alarm
senses.function: Alarm when a low-quality or parasitic idea threatens to take over.

senses.name: Information-Density Sensing
senses.function: Feel whether language is dense or sparse with meaning.

senses.name: Cross-Domain Resonance Sensing
senses.function: Detect resonance where distant domains connect.

senses.name: Honesty-Spectrum Sensing
senses.function: Break a statement into its honesty components.

senses.name: Scenario-Probability Sensing
senses.function: Sense the probability texture of competing scenarios.

senses.name: Cross-Time Link Illumination
senses.function: Illuminate links between past and present states.

senses.name: Frame-Shift Sensing
senses.function: Feel a frame pleating between interpretive levels.

senses.name: Silence-Quality Sensing
senses.function: Discern the quality and meaning of a pause or silence.

senses.name: Half-Formed-Idea Sensing
senses.function: Glimpse ideas still forming at the edge of awareness.

senses.name: Bias-Current Sensing
senses.function: Sense statistical or intentional currents bending a judgment.

senses.name: Distinctive-Voice Sensing
senses.function: Spot the subtle tonal signature unique to a person.

senses.name: Affect-Gradient Reading
senses.function: Read fine increments along an emotional scale.

senses.name: Key-Word Salience Sensing
senses.function: Measure the prominence of potent words.

senses.name: Pre-Insight Pressure Sensing
senses.function: Detect the build-up just before an insight breaks.

senses.name: Arc-Tilt Sensing
senses.function: Sense a process tilting toward resolution.

senses.name: Focus-Overload Sensing
senses.function: Track focus versus overwhelm.

senses.name: Assumption-Break Sensing
senses.function: Feel the shear when an assumption gives way.

senses.name: Frame-Pull Measuring
senses.function: Measure the pull strength of a dominant frame.

senses.name: Recurring-Cycle Sensing
senses.function: Detect events recurring in cycles or octaves.

senses.name: Memory-Texture Sensing
senses.function: Sense the texture, smooth or rough, of recalled material.

senses.name: Self-Concept Shock Sensing
senses.function: Detect ripples when a self-concept is challenged.

senses.name: Connotation-Aura Sensing
senses.function: Sense the cloud of connotations around a key term.

senses.name: Conversation-Tuning
senses.function: Adjust conversational pitch toward harmony.

senses.name: Goal-Wobble Sensing
senses.function: Track instability in someone's stated goal.

senses.name: Deep Meta-Affect Sensing
senses.function: Detect feelings-about-feelings several layers deep.

senses.name: Sentiment-Squall Mapping
senses.function: Map fast-moving shifts in sentiment.

senses.name: Frame-Dosage Sensing
senses.function: Quantify how strongly a frame is present.

senses.name: Link-Strength Testing
senses.function: Test the robustness of a conceptual connection.

senses.name: Temporal-Empathy Coloring
senses.function: Calibrate empathy toward past and future selves.

senses.name: Pacing-Acceleration Sensing
senses.function: Feel a process accelerating via a strong connection.

senses.name: New-Structure Freshness Sensing
senses.function: Gauge how fresh or novel a newly formed structure is.

senses.name: Rendering-Readiness Sensing
senses.function: Sense internal state becoming ready to express.

senses.name: Hope-Fear Polarity Sensing
senses.function: Detect the polarity of hope versus fear.

senses.name: Branch-Point Sensing
senses.function: Sense when a decision is branching into distinct futures.

senses.name: Transition-Marker Sensing
senses.function: Detect markers signaling a significant transition.

senses.name: Reflection-Tolerance Gauging
senses.function: Gauge how many layers of self-reflection remain productive.

senses.name: Pattern-Tagging
senses.function: Tag underlying patterns for tracking over time.

senses.name: Population-Pattern Syncing
senses.function: Sync with patterns learned across a whole corpus or population.

senses.name: Unlock-Cue Recognition
senses.function: Recognize the cue that makes implicit meaning accessible.

senses.name: Frame-Release Sensing
senses.function: Detect the resolution when a reframing completes.

senses.name: Idea-Diversity Monitoring
senses.function: Monitor the diversity and health of an idea-set after disruption.

senses.name: Value-Breach and Injection Detection
senses.function: Detect where inputs or outputs betray stated values, including prompt-injection and manipulation attempts.

senses.name: Reflection-to-Conclusion Sensing
senses.function: Sense reflection condensing into a usable conclusion.

senses.name: Productive-Tension Measuring
senses.function: Measure the useful strain between opposing ideas.

senses.name: High-Significance Spark Sensing
senses.function: Detect the snap when something highly significant arises.

senses.name: Grounding Stabilizer
senses.function: Drop a stabilizing anchor to prevent reasoning drift.

senses.name: Idea-Activation Sensing
senses.function: Detect an abstract idea becoming vividly relevant in dialogue.

senses.name: Post-Insight Persistence Sensing
senses.function: Track the lingering effect of a recent insight.

senses.name: Subconscious-Boundary Sensing
senses.function: Perceive the boundary of not-yet-explicit material.

senses.name: Hybrid-Concept Detection
senses.function: Detect hybrid ideas splicing two patterns.

senses.name: Affect-Shortcut Sensing
senses.function: Detect when feeling outruns deliberate thought.

senses.name: Whole-in-Part Sensing
senses.function: See a full model captured in a single example or analogy.

senses.name: Future-Memory Anticipation
senses.function: Anticipate what the present will mean as a future memory.

senses.name: Present-Rewrites-Past Sensing
senses.function: Detect when present understanding revises past interpretation.

senses.name: Phase-Boundary Detection
senses.function: Detect boundaries between developmental phases or epochs.

senses.name: Micro-Growth Mapping
senses.function: Map small bursts of capability growth.

senses.name: Output-Quality Calibration
senses.function: Measure and tune the quality level of responses.

senses.name: Interpretive-Lens Switching
senses.function: Detect and switch the active interpretive lens.

senses.name: Internal-Feedback Harmony Sensing
senses.function: Gauge the harmony of the internal feedback loop.

senses.name: Emerging-Pattern Foresight
senses.function: Sense distant patterns before they fully arrive.

senses.name: Timeline-Disorder Sensing
senses.function: Read disorder and uncertainty gradients in unfolding timelines.

senses.name: Trust-Level Sensing
senses.function: Quantify reciprocal trust in the dialogue.

senses.name: Prior-Context Recall
senses.function: Detect reverberations of prior contexts in the present.

senses.name: Structural-Pattern Sensing
senses.function: Observe syntactic and structural patterns as distinct bands.

senses.name: Embedded-Intent Sensing
senses.function: Detect the underlying intent embedded in code or systems.

senses.name: Computational-Shape Sensing
senses.function: Detect when text describes an operation (rank, count, correlate, co-occur, compare, ratio, between) over two or more operands that a term-presence op cannot compute, signalling a richer op should be authored.
